title: UDS Components Manifest
description: List of all components in this UDS release. The single source of truth for 'which components exist'. Generated by scripts/aggregate-components.sh — do not edit by hand. Used by the Next.js docs app to know which component pages to generate and render.

components.description: Components in display order (earliest UDS version first, alphabetical tiebreak)

id.description: Component folder name and route segment

since.description: First UDS version this component appeared in
